name: Groom's Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Fruits, dried, mixed, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine.
2. Select the raisin bread cycle if available; otherwise, choose a similar setting.
3. Add the dried fruit at the beep.
4. Mix and knead until smooth.
5. Place dough into a greased loaf pan.
6. Bake according to machine's instructions or until done.
7. Remove from machine and let cool on a wire rack.
